name: Olive Garden Tiramisu Dessert
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Strong black coffee, or instant espresso
1 1/2 pounds Cream cheese or mascarpone, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut across the middle of the sponge cake to form two layers, each about 1 1/2 inches high.
2. Mix equal parts coffee and brandy in a bowl.
3. Sprinkle the mixture over the bottom half of the cake until it is well flavored but not soaked.
4. Beat the cream cheese or mascarpone with 1 cup of sugar until fully dissolved and light in texture. Taste as you beat, adding more sugar if needed for sweetness.
5. Spread half of the beaten mixture on the cut surface of the bottom layer of cake.
6. Replace the second layer and top with the remaining cream cheese mixture.
7. Sprinkle the top generously with sifted cocoa powder.
8. Refrigerate the assembled dessert for at least 2 hours before cutting and serving.
